/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -std=c++17 -I/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml@2/2.6.2/include -O2 CMakeFiles/ParchisGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o ParchisGame  lib/libmain.a lib/libParchisGUI.a lib/libParchis.a lib/libBoard.a lib/libDice.a lib/libPiece.a lib/libPowerBar.a lib/libBoardTrap.a lib/libClickableSprite.a lib/libBoardSprite.a lib/libDiceSprite.a lib/libPieceSprite.a lib/libSpecialItemSprite.a lib/libBoardTrapSprite.a lib/libExplosionSprite.a lib/libPlayer.a lib/libAIPlayer.a lib/libNinja.a lib/libGUIPlayer.a lib/libRemotePlayer.a lib/libSpriteAnimator.a lib/libButton.a lib/libConnection.a lib/libGameSelector.a lib/libHeuristic.a lib/libNodeCounter.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-network.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
